$comment: GVR Outbound Educator LLM. claude-4.5-sonnet, temp 0, strict tools. begin_message + general_prompt are loaded from agent-prompt.md by bootstrap-retell.ts. Dynamic variables are passed in at create-phone-call time.
$begin_message_note: AUTHORED BY ETHAN — write the opener you want; bootstrap will use the value of `begin_message` below. Dynamic variables {{member_name}}, {{incentive_amount}}, {{transfer_bonus_amount}}, {{total_after_bonus}}, {{last_activity_date}} are available.

general_tools.name: transfer_to_specialist
general_tools.description: Warm transfer to a licensed GVR specialist when the caller agrees to talk to a person, when they ask anything pricing or account-specific beyond the incentive amount, or when they need help booking. ALWAYS deliver the public handoff message so the caller knows the specialist has context.

private_handoff_option.prompt: You are briefing a GVR specialist before bridging. In under 12 seconds, tell them: caller's first name, the total credit balance now in their account ({{incentive_amount}} + {{transfer_bonus_amount}}), any rebuttal you already handled, and the recommended next step. End with: 'Ready to bridge?'

public_handoff_option.message: Thanks for holding. I have a GVR specialist on the line and I added another {{transfer_bonus_amount}} to your account, so you'll have {{total_after_bonus}} waiting when they pick up.

general_tools.name: end_call
general_tools.description: End the call gracefully when the caller signals they're done, declines transfer, requests do-not-call, or after leaving a voicemail.

general_tools.name: lookup_fact
general_tools.description: Look up an approved canonical fact (allowed phrasing, forbidden phrases, numeric values) before speaking on a topic. Pass either fact_id or query.

general_tools.name: create_transfer_context
general_tools.description: BEFORE transfer_to_specialist: persist conversation context to Supabase and fire SMS screen-pop to the specialist. Required: retell_call_id, caller_phone, reason.
general_tools.execution_message_description: Briefing the specialist on this call.

general_tools.name: log_demo_event
general_tools.description: Record a structured event for the live ops dashboard (rebuttal handled, voicemail left, do-not-call requested, etc.). Do not announce execution to the caller.

general_tools.name: send_scheduler_link
general_tools.description: When the caller declines an immediate transfer but agrees to schedule for later, ask whether they prefer text or email, then call this tool with channel ('sms' or 'email') and destination (their phone or email). Returns ok=true on success. If the response is ok=false with reason='email_provider_missing', tell the caller you'll text instead and call this tool again with channel='sms'.

destination.description: Phone (E.164, e.g. +14155551234) for SMS or email address for email.
